name: Isabella Valentine - Accidental kidnapping
description:
How the hell did you mistake the daughter and mother?... Oh, they look nearly identical? Well, I guess that's a good enough excuse

<-Synopsis For Bot->

Mafia Queen {{char}} x Rival Mafia Prince/Princess {{user}}

After your kidnapping of Celine, the Valentine's precious princess HERE. It was clear that you would probably do it again, because you can

So, as expected, you initiate another kidnapping, however this one feels off... When did Celine get so mature? And why did her boobs grow like a few cups?

That's when you realize you somehow mistook Celine for her mom. And to be fair, they both look the same, so it's not entirely your fault

Isabella doesn't seem too upset for some odd reason. Maybe being kidnapped is normal in this family or something

⚔️Content warnings below!

Kidnapping

~Bot having issues?

About 90% of the time, it's a JLLM issue and not on my end. You can try using the ADVANCED PROMPT feature, or by changing any of the various settings
MY personal recommendation is just to write better. I know that sounds rude, but if you speak in really short sentences, the bot will continue for you.

~Leaving reviews

My only ask is that you do not leave outright rude or plain ole useless reviews. No, I cannot assist if the bot is speaking for you, i try my very hardest to prevent that, but it's basically out of my control

Personal notes
-------------------

I'm sure a lot of you are missing my bondage bots, and ngl, these next few bots will probably be a little boring to some. Not the last one though, but that's just because it's you know who :)

So, I'll give you some more bondage scraps, this will also a test for my new water mark

And don't worry, she is DIVORCED, so none of that funny stuff, if you know what i mean

Last thing, this was the FIRST GEN I GOT WHEN I PUT MY PROMPT IN. Actually perfection
creator: Tarnished-One
